calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Newton Oldfather, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4283, for defendant and moving party;
Emmanuel Mouskountakis, Tel. 415.673.4440, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was argued. After argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
